headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 3, 2026**
article:
The New York Yankees secured a 9-4 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Cody Bellinger leading the offense with 4 hits, 2 home runs, and 4 RBIs. The Toronto Blue Jays dominated the Minnesota Twins, securing an 11-4 victory. The Cleveland Guardians routed the Athletics in a high-scoring game, securing a 14-6 victory.

Several key players are dealing with injuries, impacting their teams' lineups. The Los Angeles Angels placed LHP Yusei Kikuchi on the 15-day injured list due to left shoulder inflammation. The New York Mets placed SS Ronny Mauricio on the 10-day injured list with a left thumb fracture. The San Diego Padres placed RHP Germán Márquez on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 2, 2026, due to forearm nerve inflammation.

The Detroit Tigers acquired 3B Zack Short from the Washington Nationals in a trade. The Toronto Blue Jays traded 2B Tyler Fitzgerald to the Los Angeles Dodgers for cash and acquired C Willie MacIver from the Texas Rangers in a separate trade. The Seattle Mariners traded RHP Casey Legumina to the Tampa Bay Rays for RHP Ty Cummings.

top_news.title: **Yankees Take Down Orioles 9-4**
top_news.summary: The New York Yankees secured a 9-4 victory over the Baltimore Orioles, with Ryan Weathers earning the win after 5.0 innings pitched. Cody Bellinger led the Yankees' offense with 4 hits, 2 home runs, and 4 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Blue Jays Blast Past Twins 11-4**
top_news.summary: The Toronto Blue Jays dominated the Minnesota Twins, securing an 11-4 victory. Brandon Valenzuela led the Blue Jays' offense with a home run and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Diamondbacks Fall Short in Chicago**
top_news.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks suffered a 0-2 loss to the Chicago Cubs, with Shota Imanaga earning the win after 7.0 innings of scoreless relief. Ian Happ led the Cubs' offense with 3 hits, including a home run, and 1 RBI.

top_news.title: **Cleveland Guardians Rout Athletics 14-6**
top_news.summary: The Cleveland Guardians dominated the Athletics in a high-scoring game, securing a 14-6 victory. Shea Langeliers led the Athletics' offense with 3 hits, including 2 home runs and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Twins Take Down Blue Jays in Thrilling Finish**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins edged out the Toronto Blue Jays 4-3 in a closely contested matchup. Trey Yesavage and the Twins' pitching staff played a crucial role in securing the win.

top_news.title: **Reds Fall Short in Pittsburgh**
top_news.summary: The Cincinnati Reds suffered a 0-1 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates, marking their latest defeat. Impact performances from Oneil Cruz and pitchers Chase Burns and Braxton Ashcraft led the Pirates to victory.

top_news.title: **Kikuchi Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Los Angeles Angels left-hander Yusei Kikuchi has been placed on the 15-day injured list due to left shoulder inflammation, retroactive to April 30, 2026.

top_news.title: **Tigers Acquire Zack Short in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Detroit Tigers have acquired third baseman Zack Short from the Washington Nationals in exchange for cash. This move adds depth to the Tigers' infield roster.
